title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMTrafficSign
description: Road and traffic signs from OpenStreetMap tagged with traffic_sign=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMTrafficSign

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

trafficSignType.description: Property. The OSM traffic_sign value specifying the sign type or code (e.g. speed_limit, stop). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:traffic_sign'

direction.description: Property. Direction the sign is facing (degree or compass). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:direction'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
